title: Travis Scott: India Tour - 2025
subtitle: Get ready to lose your minds as La Flame ignites the stage with the energy that makes stadiums shake.  You'll feel like you've stepped into another dimension.

title: Cap Mania Tour Ft Himesh Reshammiya
subtitle:
Himesh Reshammiya LIVE! Relive the hits, sing along, and dance to timeless anthems—pure nostalgia, unstoppable energy! 
A night of magic - Aashiq Banaya, Jhalak Dikhla Ja & more! Don’t miss the ultimate musical celebration!
